name: Hero's Plate (Greater)
description:
Golden images of heroic deeds decorate the black plates of this +2 greater resilient full plate. You gain resistance 10 to mental damage and a +2 status bonus to saves against fear.

Activate—Personal Legend (1 Action) (concentration)

Frequency once per day

Effect The scenes depicted on your armor shift and change, making room to accommodate your current heroic feats. You cast 6th-rank Heroism on yourself.
